rag_findings.detail: The most decisive piece of evidence is the meta-data regarding the Google Street View camera rig; the large, rounded silver hood visible at the bottom of the image is a known characteristic of the car used in Jamaica. The vegetation and general road infrastructure are highly characteristic of the Caribbean, specifically matching the profile of the Dominican Republic.
